title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Pepperfry - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Pepperfry - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pepperfry. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Pepperfry:
Pepperfry is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pepperfry!
